hero.title: Secondary Market
hero.description: Share trading between shareholders to buy, sell, and launch buy offers in a secure and fully digital environment.

features.title: Share trading between shareholders
features.description: Manage secondary transactions end-to-end: listing offers, acceptance, execution, and tracking.

items.title: Sell my shares
items.description: Publish sell offers with share amount, price per share, dates, and execution conditions.

items.title: Buy shares
items.description: Browse active sell offers and complete purchases with guided steps, validations, and purchase summary.

items.title: Launch buy offer
items.description: Publish buying interest to attract sellers and trigger transactions when no suitable offer is available.

items.title: Order book and price context
items.description: Track average price, volume, and detailed buy/sell offers to make better-informed decisions.

items.title: Status and full traceability
items.description: Follow each transaction by status (active, accepted, etc.) and keep historical records for control.

items.title: Integrated with corporate management
items.description: Connect secondary operations with cap table and documentation to keep ownership data up to date.
